ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "recipe_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipe */,
  "url" TEXT /* Link to the recipe online */,
  "ratings" INTEGER /* Number of ratings received */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the recipe */,
  "prep_time" TEXT /* Preparation time required for the recipe */,
  "cook_time" TEXT /* Cooking time required for the recipe */,
  "total_time" TEXT /* Total time including prep and cook */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the recipe */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the recipe was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date the recipe was last modified */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the recipe image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the recipe */,
  "servings" INTEGER /* Number of servings */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Calories per serving */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., casual, chef, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe associated with the ingredient */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity required */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Measurement unit for the ingredient */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ingredient (e.g., organic, gluten-free) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ingredients_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructions" (
  "instruction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instruction step */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe associated with the instruction */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Step number in the cooking process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cooking step */,
  "images" TEXT /* URLs of images illustrating the cooking step (comma-separated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instruction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructions_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe that is being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who rated the recipe */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating given by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* User's review of the recipe */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the rating was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Cakes, Appetizers) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_categories" (
  "recipe_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe-category association */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_categories_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cooking_times" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for cooking time entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe */,
  "prep_time" TEXT /* Preparation time */,
  "cook_time" TEXT /* Cooking time */,
  "total_time" TEXT /* Total time including prep and cook */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cooking_times_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the activity */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe involved */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., viewed, saved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the activity was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who favorited the recipe */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe that was favorited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_tags" (
  "recipe_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe-tag association */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_tags_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the comment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_links" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media link */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe */,
  "social_media_type" TEXT /* Type of social media platform (e.g., Instagram, Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the social media post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_links_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutritional_info" (
  "nutritional_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutritional entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Calories per serving */,
  "protein" INTEGER /* Protein per serving in grams */,
  "fat" INTEGER /* Fat per serving in grams */,
  "carbohydrates" INTEGER /* Carbohydrates per serving in grams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutritional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutritional_info_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)
